world.title: Woman hid under car, called 911 after she and boyfriend shot, jurors hear in murder trial
world.description: Amber Beach had just been shot in the back, and the gunman was still in the backseat of her boyfriend's truck, when she opened her passenger door, rolled onto the ground, crawled away and called 911 as she hid under a parked car, jurors heard Monday in a Calgary courtroom. Beach’s incredible story of survival emerged on Day 1 of Paulos Berhe’s second-degree murder trial.
